title: Visual Polish — Borders and Radius
description: Give your blog cards a polished, modern look. Add border-radius to round the corners of .post cards, a border-bottom accent to h1 headings, and a subtle box-shadow to make posts float above the background. Also style .post img elements with border-radius and max-width: 100% so images look great and never overflow.
test_code:
assert 'border-radius' in css.lower(), 'Missing border-radius property'
assert 'border-bottom' in css.lower(), 'Missing border-bottom on h1'
assert 'box-shadow' in css.lower(), 'Missing box-shadow on .post'
assert 'max-width' in css.lower() and '100%' in css, 'Images should have max-width: 100%'
assert '.post' in css.lower(), 'Missing .post selector'
acceptance_criteria: h1 has a border-bottom accent line
hints: A subtle border-radius like 8px gives a modern card look
Try box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) for a soft shadow
border-bottom: 3px solid #0077cc makes a nice heading accent
